extortion.description: Since 1988, we have been working together with homeowners, architects, and designers to bring ideas to life. Our core purpose is to inspire excitement through innovative products and support. At GENROSE Stone + Tile, we not only provide premium stone and tile for your project, we also look for ways to serve your best interests. Service and support are the foundations of the GENROSE brand, and your needs, creative vision, and long-term satisfaction are always our first priority. That's the difference we make every day. We search the world for the most beautiful natural stone and stay in step with fashion trends and technical innovations in interior design. With a very careful eye on style, quality and durability we source, import, and stock over 300 varieties of stone slabs and literally thousands of tile options. With our handcrafted tiles we can make any shape and any color tile in our manufacturing plant right in Connecticut to fulfill your vision.
